Department.GetEmployeesByCode: SELECT * FROM Employee e INNER JOIN Department d ON e.DepartmentID = d.DepartmentID WHERE d.DepartmentCode = @DepartmentCode
Department.CountEmployeesByCode: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Employee e INNER JOIN Department d ON e.DepartmentID = d.DepartmentID WHERE d.DepartmentCode = @DepartmentCode
Employee.GetByDepartmentId: SELECT * FROM Employee WHERE DepartmentID=@DepartmentID AND IsDeleted = FALSE
Employee.GetByPositionId: SELECT * FROM Employee WHERE PositionID=@PositionID AND IsDeleted = FALSE
